title: Adding a guest to a shared board
excerpt:
Hi monday.com community, 
I usually have no trouble with this, but I am having some difficulty adding a guest to a shared board. Is anyone running into the same issue? Is this a known error that is currently being fixed? …

posts.author: gideon_rosen (Gideon Rosen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com community,

I usually have no trouble with this, but I am having some difficulty adding a guest to a shared board. Is anyone running into the same issue? Is this a known error that is currently being fixed?

Thanks!

Gideon

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Just tried and didn’t have any problems. Maybe it’s fixed? I heard a colleague this afternoon saying he had some issues as well.
